goals.title: ParentPick Guard Codex Plugin mini-Ralphthon continuation. Deliver an...
goals.objective: ParentPick Guard Codex Plugin mini-Ralphthon continuation. Deliver and continuously improve the Codex plugin in this repository without marking final completion until the user explicitly says to finish. Requirements: valid plugin under plugins/parentpick-guard with manifest, skill, local PowerShell tools, examples, templates, generated sample HTML, demo screenshot, README, .agents/plugins/marketplace.json, docs/FINAL_REPORT.md, docs/DEMO_SCRIPT.md, documented verification. Constraints: Windows 11, PowerShell 7 only, work only inside current repository, no Bash WSL Git Bash Linux shell syntax rm chmod sed awk grep make, no secrets/env credential reads, no registry/PATH/execution-policy/user-profile changes, no deploy package publish account paid API, no crawling login scraping browser automation Chrome extension, no affiliate links, no medical diagnoses, no unsupported real-product danger claims, real brand demo data only as public-source case notes, no direct git commits because outer PowerShell runner handles commits. Continue useful quality tasks such as UI/UX report polish, structural stability, agent-system accuracy, response quality, edge-case tests, verification evidence, and documentation consistency until explicit finish prompt.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI happy path: run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\Test-ParentPickGuard.ps1 from repo root; PASS iff stdout object has Status PASS, generated sample-report.html exists, and demo-screenshot.png exists.

CLI malformed-input edge path: run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\Test-ParentPickGuard.ps1 and inspect its built-in blank-report-title and empty-sources negative cases; PASS iff verifier exits 0 after those cases assert expected generator failure messages.

CLI regression/docs path: run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\Test-ParentPickGuard.ps1 from repo root; PASS iff verifier exits 0 after checking README, RUN_LOG, DECISIONS, manifest URL, marketplace entry, and validation-status wording consistency.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019ea0ae-7d2f-7652-a935-f8041bbffdcb/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019ea0ae-7d2f-7652-a935-f8041bbffdcb/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
